\# Copilot Instructions - Barberia-app



\- This is a Python Streamlit barber shop booking app.

\- Keep changes small and reviewable.

\- Do not analyze all of app.py at once.

\- Do not run long-lived processes.

\- Do not run Streamlit without timeout.

\- Do not change business logic unless explicitly requested.

\- Do not mix docs, UI, performance, cleanup, and database changes.

\- Preserve current behavior unless the task explicitly asks otherwise.

\- Validate app.py with AST parsing after edits.
